data.title: Stadium Goods brings its sneaker sales to Walmart Marketplace
data.description: The partnership will bring Stadium Goods to Walmart's third-party marketplace from brands such as Nike, Jordan, On, Ugg and more.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Who offers free shipping, and how much does it matter?
data.description: Retailers that offer free shipping vary by merchant type, but the popular option still carries weight as shoppers make purchase decisions.

data.title: Freightos preliminary results indicate strong Q3 growth as digital freight adoption expands
data.description: With most large airlines already participating, Freightos expects future growth to come from regional or specialized carriers as smaller operators increase their digital capabilities.

data.title: Target previews how it will use AI to fuel its next retail phase
data.description: Among Target’s most visible initiatives is Trend Brain, a generative AI platform that scans global data to identify emerging styles and design patterns.

data.title: Rezolve Ai revamps leadership to accelerate growth and sharpen AI strategy
data.description: Rezolve said the leadership overhaul follows a series of strategic acquisitions that have expanded its data and payments infrastructure.
